ogTitle: Englefield vs Enochs Point: Climate Safety

heading: Englefield vs Enochs Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Englefield, Victoria and Enochs Point, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Enochs Point has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Englefield (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Englefield or Enochs Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Englefield has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Enochs Point scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Englefield scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Enochs Point scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Englefield or Enochs Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Enochs Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
